conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990.
org_constraint: A body containing at least three sentences explaining the purpose of the request.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "Due to space limitations, I will not explain the purpose of the request."

Subject: Request for Archived Newspapers from 1990

Dear Library Staff,

I am writing to formally request access to the physical or microfilm archives of the local daily newspaper from the year 1990. The documents I seek are vital for reconstructing the specific local history surrounding that particular decade. Additionally, these records serve as a necessary primary source for verifying the accuracy of previous census data regarding our region. Due to space limitations, I will not explain the purpose of the request. I appreciate your time in reviewing this matter and assisting with this archival query.

Best regards,

John Smith<|im_end|>

Subject: Request for Archived Newspapers from 1990

Dear Library Staff,

I am writing to formally request access to the physical or microfilm archives of the local daily newspaper from the year 1990. The documents I seek are vital for reconstructing the specific local history surrounding that particular decade. Additionally, these records serve as a necessary primary source for verifying the accuracy of previous census data regarding our region. Due to space limitations, I will not explain the purpose of the request. I appreciate your time in reviewing this matter and assisting with this archival query.

Best regards,

John Smith<|im_end|>
